backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Manish Infratech ICP backend; manages user profiles, bills (with line items, GST, payments), party GST numbers, and exposes query/update methods with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that defines old and new actor state shapes (user profiles, bills, party GST numbers) and provides a no-op `run` function since the schemas are currently identical.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (GST display on invoice, bill date field, 30 line items, CSV download, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, used as build planning reference for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Manish Infratech React app, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (add-bill, search, summary, invoice print, party-summary, company-report) wrapped in AuthGuard and Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page screen shown to unauthorized principals displaying their principal ID, a denial message, and a logout button to switch accounts.
frontend/src/components/AddBillForm.tsx: A form component for creating new bills with line items, party name, invoice number, and date fields. Handles GST calculations, duplicate invoice checking, and autocomplete for party/product names.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: A route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication, user role authorization, and profile setup status before rendering children. Redirects to login, access denied, or profile setup screens as appropriate.
frontend/src/components/AutocompleteInpu: A reusable text input component that shows a filtered dropdown of suggestions based on the current value. Handles outside click detection to close the dropdown.
frontend/src/components/BillResultsTable: A table component that displays a list of bills with columns for invoice number, date, party name, amounts, and payment status. Supports edit and delete actions with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/EditBillModal.ts: A modal dialog for editing an existing bill's party name, date, and line items, pre-populated from the provided bill data. Computes GST totals and submits changes via the editBill mutation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintView: A print-optimized invoice layout component that renders a formatted tax invoice for a given bill, including company header, party details, line items table, and GST breakdown.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a sticky header, desktop/mobile navigation links, user profile display, and logout functionality. Hides the layout on print pages.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login page component that prompts the user to authenticate via Internet Identity, showing a loading state during the login process.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal for first-time users to enter their name and save an owner profile before accessing the app.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Displays a 2x2 grid of metric cards showing total revenue, total GST, CGST, and SGST with icons and formatted currency values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user roles, profiles, bills (CRUD), aggregates, party summaries, and reports.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the Manish Infratech color palette (Navy/Saffron) in both light and dark modes, plus print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AddBillPage.tsx: Page component that renders a header with a PlusCircle icon and the AddBillForm component for creating new GST invoices.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyReportPage.tsx: Page that displays a date-filtered billing report for a specific party (from URL search params), showing invoice details in a table with a CSV download option.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePrintPage.tsx: Page that fetches a bill by invoice number from the URL params and renders a print-friendly invoice view with print controls and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/PartySummaryPage.tsx: Page displaying a company-wise billing summary table with date range filtering, inline GST number editing, and navigation to per-party reports.
frontend/src/pages/SearchBillsPage.tsx: Page that fetches all bills and provides client-side filtering by party name or invoice number, displaying results in a BillResultsTable.
frontend/src/pages/SummaryPage.tsx: Page showing overall billing aggregates, profit/loss summary, and a date-filterable bills table with CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Utility module exporting two functions: formatCurrency for Indian locale currency formatting with ₹ symbol, and formatAmount for a compact ₹-prefixed two-decimal string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for the Manish Infratech billing app, documenting current features, architectural notes, known issues, and versioned feature records for build planning.
